title: quercus × pseudinfectoria
intro: Quercus × pseudinfectoria, also known as the hybrid of Quercus robur and Quercus infectoria, is a deciduous tree species that belongs to the Fagaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its rich content of tannins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Quercus × pseudinfectoria have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Quercus × pseudinfectoria is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
